extName.description: Extension name shown in Chrome UI.

extDesc.message: Open-source screenshot tool — full-page, region, and visible-area capture with annotation and PDF export.
extDesc.description: Extension description shown in the Chrome Web Store and extensions page.

modeFullPage.description: Capture mode: capture the entire scrolling page.

modeVisible.description: Capture mode: capture what is currently visible.

modeRegion.description: Capture mode: capture a user-dragged region.

modeFullPageSub.description: Subtitle for the Full Page capture mode.

modeVisibleSub.description: Subtitle for the Visible Area capture mode.

modeRegionSub.description: Subtitle for the Selected Region capture mode.

capturing.description: Status shown while a capture is in progress.

saved.description: Success toast after a screenshot is saved.

cannotCaptureProtected.description: Error shown when the active page cannot be captured (e.g. chrome:// pages).

comingSoon.description: Placeholder message for features not yet implemented.

welcomeCta.description: Primary call-to-action on the welcome card.
